narrative:
Hiram Township has 1,853 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
